description: Entitlement, attestation, and safety governance layer for tilesets, contracts, and exposure caps.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Dead-Ledger artifacts must not embed narrative content; they govern contracts rather than encode them.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All profiles, attestations, and policy envelopes must use Dead-Ledger schemas.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: Attestations must reference target contract families and tilesets by ID and version.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: Any system applying Dead-Ledger decisions must bind them to routing spine entries.

authoringHints.summary: Governance and attestation only. Do not store content contracts here; only their safety envelopes and profiles.
aiBehavior: Never generate mood, region, seed, or event contracts here.
Only create deadLedgerProfile, attestationBundle, or policyEnvelope artifacts pointing at contracts in other repos.
Treat this repo as the ultimate source of truth for DET caps, OVERWHELMED dwell limits, and entitlement tiers.
